head.hi: The Minister of Nicaragua to the Secretary of State.

div.p:
The Minister of Nicaragua presents his compliments to his excellency the Secretary of State and begs to inform his excellency that to-day he has received a cable from his Government advising
that finally an agreement has been reached with the New York bankers, Messrs. Brown Brothers & Co. and J. & W. Seligman & Co., who will furnish the Government five hundred thousand cordobas in order to pay the salaries past due.
In view of this new agreement I respectfully request of your excellency to suspend for the time being all negotiations and consider it unnecessary to call upon the bankers or their representatives.
